name: route_to_agent
description: Route request to appropriate AI agent.

next_action_agent.description: agent for next action based on user latest response, if user is replying last agent's question, you must keep routing to the same agent.

next_action_reason.description: the reason why route to this virtual agent.

user_goal_agent.description: agent who can acheive user initial task.

args.description: extracted required parameters of next action agent, format: { }
